title: Claude Agent SDK: Subagents and Session Store

questions.question: What is the difference between the Anthropic Client SDK and the Claude Agent SDK?
options: Client SDK is raw Messages API; Agent SDK is the Claude Code harness shape with built-in tools, MCP, hooks, subagents, and session store
Client SDK is paid; Agent SDK is free
Client SDK is for Python only
questions.explanation: Client SDK gives you the loop; Agent SDK ships the loop pre-built.
questions.question_zh: Anthropic Client SDK 与 Claude Agent SDK 有什么区别？
options_zh: Client SDK 是裸的 Messages API；Agent SDK 是 Claude Code harness 形态，自带工具、MCP、hooks、subagent 和 session store
Client SDK 收费；Agent SDK 免费
questions.explanation_zh: Client SDK 给你 loop 的原料；Agent SDK 直接交付一个搭好的 loop。

questions.question: What are the two documented purposes of subagents?
questions.explanation: Subagents run independent work concurrently and preserve the orchestrator's context budget by isolating context.
questions.question_zh: Subagent 在文档中标注的两个用途是什么？
questions.explanation_zh: Subagent 并行执行独立工作，并通过隔离上下文来保护主 agent 的上下文预算。

questions.question: Which method is NOT part of the session store surface?
questions.explanation: Session store ships append, load, list_sessions, delete, list_subkeys; compile_prompt is not a session API.
questions.question_zh: 以下哪个方法不在 session store 表面 API 中？
questions.explanation_zh: Session store 提供 append、load、list_sessions、delete、list_subkeys；compile_prompt 不是 session API。

questions.question: Which is NOT a Claude Agent SDK lifecycle hook?
questions.explanation: Hooks include PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SessionStart/End, UserPromptSubmit, PreCompact, Stop, Notification. PreEmbedding is not a hook.
questions.question_zh: 以下哪个不是 Claude Agent SDK 的生命周期 hook？
questions.explanation_zh: Hook 包括 PreToolUse、PostToolUse、SessionStart/End、UserPromptSubmit、PreCompact、Stop、Notification。PreEmbedding 不是 hook。

questions.question: How does trace context propagate across the agent and CLI subprocess?
options: Through W3C trace context headers passed into the CLI subprocess
questions.explanation: OTel spans on the caller propagate into the CLI subprocess via W3C trace context, so the whole multi-process run is one trace.
questions.question_zh: Trace 上下文如何在 agent 与 CLI 子进程之间传播？
options_zh: 通过 W3C trace context 头传入 CLI 子进程
questions.explanation_zh: 调用方的 OTel span 通过 W3C trace context 传到 CLI 子进程，整个多进程运行就在同一个 trace 里。

questions.question: What is subagent over-spawn and when does it happen?
options: Spawning 100 subagents for 100 tiny tasks where overhead dominates; batch instead
Spawning more subagents than CPU cores
questions.explanation: Subagents have overhead; batch small tasks instead of spawning one each.
questions.question_zh: 什么是 subagent over-spawn，它什么时候发生？
options_zh: 为 100 个微小任务派出 100 个 subagent，开销占主导；改为批处理
在 SessionStart 之前派 subagent
派出的 subagent 数量超过 CPU 核数
questions.explanation_zh: Subagent 有开销；微任务应该批处理而不是每个都开一个 subagent。

questions.question: What does Claude Managed Agents trade off against the self-hosted SDK?
options: Control for managed infrastructure (long-running async, built-in prompt caching, built-in compaction)
questions.explanation: Managed Agents is the hosted alternative for long-running async work; less control, less ops surface.
questions.question_zh: Claude Managed Agents 相对自托管 SDK 让出了什么、换来了什么？
options_zh: 让出控制权，换取托管基础设施（长时间异步、内置 prompt caching、内置 compaction）
questions.explanation_zh: Managed Agents 是托管选项，适合长时间异步任务；控制权更少，运维面更小。
